title: Ethereum Smart Contract Engineering
subtitle: Solidity, EVM, security, gas, DeFi patterns — write production smart contracts.
tagline: The world computer. Build dApps the right way.
outcomes: Understand Ethereum's architecture: EVM, accounts, gas, blocks.
Write, test, and deploy Solidity smart contracts.
Design contracts with security-first patterns; avoid common vulnerabilities.
Implement ERC-20 tokens, ERC-721 NFTs, and proxy upgradeability.
Optimize gas; understand storage vs. memory; pack variables.
Connect frontends with ethers.js / viem and wallet libraries.

modules.title: Ethereum fundamentals
modules.objective: Master Ethereum's architecture and developer environment.

modules.title: Token standards
modules.objective: Build ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 tokens.

modules.title: Security and patterns
modules.objective: Prevent the vulnerabilities that have lost billions.

modules.title: Production deployment
modules.objective: Ship safely to mainnet and L2s.
